commit.subject: LU-18114 lcfg: split "lctl lcfg_*" group into subcommands
commit.message:
LU-18114 lcfg: split "lctl lcfg_*" group into subcommands

Split "lctl lcfg_*" command group into subcommands, e.g.
"lctl lcfg_clear" to "lctl lcfg clear".
Also, conf-sanity.sh test_109 is modified to verify this patch.

Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=109

Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic285b93682d83dc1278b08fce609f82fcc8cf801
